title: UChicago Medicine to study impact of Formula 1 racing season on performance
summary_en: Partnership with TGR Haas F1 Team will examine physical, cognitive and psychological toll of motorsports
title_cn: 芝加哥大学医学中心联合哈斯F1车队开展一级方程式赛季对人员表现影响研究

title: As Chicago's sports teams angle for new deals, students offer a playbook
summary_en: Winning team in Harris Policy Innovation Challenge at UChicago proposed sweeping overhaul of how the city handles stadium deals with pro sports franchises
title_cn: 芝加哥市洽谈职业体育队合作新协议之际 芝加哥大学学生在政策创新挑战赛中提出解决方案
